# AIQTP™ — AI Quantum Trading Platform

> AI-powered quantum trading platform for crypto, stocks, real estate, precious metals, and NFTs. ML-driven signals, post-quantum security, zero subscription fees.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview and AI command center.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans, fees, and subscription tiers.
- [Sign in](/auth): Account login and registration.
- [Legal](/legal): Terms of service and privacy policy.
- [Fees](/fees): Trading fees and pricing structure.
- [Performance](/performance): Strategy performance showcase.
- [Education](/education): Trading strategies, technical analysis, DeFi guides.
- [News](/news): Real-time crypto market news with AI sentiment.

## Features

- [Trading](/trading): Multi-asset trading dashboard.
- [Advanced Trading](/advanced-trading): Professional order types and tools.
- [AI Lab](/ai-lab): AI model training and backtesting.
- [Strategy Studio](/strategy-studio): Build and deploy trading strategies.
- [Strategy Marketplace](/marketplace): Browse and rent community strategies.
- [ML Predictions](/ml-predictions): Machine learning market signals.
- [Analytics](/analytics): Portfolio analytics and reporting.
- [Risk](/risk): Advanced risk management.
- [Screener](/screener): Asset screener across markets.
- [DeFi Sniper](/defi-sniper): Early DeFi token detection.
- [Quantum Lab](/quantum-lab): Quantum computing experiments.
- [NFT Studio](/nft-studio): AI-powered NFT generation.
- [Token Launchpad](/token-launchpad): Launch and discover tokens.
- [Institutional](/institutional): Institutional services.
- [Data Ecosystem](/data-ecosystem): Market data products.
- [Wallet & Assets](/wallet-assets): Unified wallet and asset hub.

## Optional

- [Social Trading](/social): Copy trading and social feeds.
- [Exchange Hub](/exchange): Connected exchange integrations.
- [Vault](/vault): Lightning Vault wallet.
